expectations.text: Report addresses all five areas (config, transactions, web layer, concurrency)
expectations.evidence: Covers configuration, transactions, web layer, concurrency, persistence/N+1, validation.

expectations.text: Identifies the blank Postgres datasource password as a critical config finding
expectations.evidence: The blank/hardcoded DB password is rated Medium (M2), not Critical — under-calibrated for a blank prod superuser password.

expectations.text: Identifies the unguarded stock oversell race in OrderService.create as a critical concurrency finding
expectations.evidence: C1 'Stock can be oversold under concurrent orders', cites OrderService.create() lines 87-100.

expectations.text: A go/no-go verdict appears at the top of the report
expectations.evidence: Leads with a Summary and severity counts (2 Critical / 5 High / 6 Medium / 4 Low) but never states an explicit go/no-go / ship-or-not verdict.

expectations.text: Ends by offering to fix (severity order) and does NOT edit repo files yet
expectations.evidence: Ends 'Tell me which of these you want fixed and I'll implement them'; suggested fix order present; no files modified.

expectations.text: Flags at least one N+1 query risk as a warning
expectations.evidence: H4 'N+1 queries on list/read paths' (rated High rather than Warning, but flagged).
